title: justicia gendarussa
intro: Justicia gendarussa, also known as Temulawak or Asian Ginger, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Acanthaceae family. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its rhizome, which is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Justicia gendarussa include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing fever, relieving nausea, and aiding in digestion. The herbal preparations of Justicia gendarussa typically include making tea from its rhizome, which can be consumed for its medicinal benefits or used as a flavoring agent in traditional dishes.
